source_levels.label: Primary textual source
source_levels.use_case: Any mantra, ritual or rule-based claim must be tied to a verified textual/source reference.

source_levels.label: Traditional or regional authority
source_levels.use_case: Regional practice, weekday association, vrata/observance-related guidance.

source_levels.label: Drishvara editorial reflection
source_levels.use_case: Safe reflective prompt only; cannot create authority, mantra or prescription.

source_record_schema.guidance_domain: weekday | colour | food | mantra | reflection | panchang_dependency
